series_metadata.series_description: Documents collected for use as evidence in disputes between employees/terminated and ODM.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in Records Center for 5 years then destroy provided no case has been filed. If a case is filed, then retain the records in the Records Center 5 years after the case is closed and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in Records Center for 5 years then destroy provided no case has been filed. If a case is filed, then retain the records in the Records Center 5 years after the case is closed and then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
